summary: Iteration 152: Truth Gate Hardening & Auth Route Restoration testing complete. All backend APIs working correctly - Board Room, War Room, and diagnosis endpoints return proper truth gate messaging when CRM/accounting/email sources are stale/unverified. Frontend authentication flow works correctly - login -> /advisor -> direct navigation to /integrations stays in app shell without bouncing to login.

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 errors (preview environment not responding) - could cause frontend to show 0 connected integrations

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'Connected 0' even though backend returns 4 connected integrations (HubSpot, Xero, outlook, microsoft). Likely a timing issue where API hasn't completed before render, or API returned 502.

integration_issues.issue: Forensic source health banner not visible even though backend returns crm_state=stale, accounting_state=stale, email_state=unverified. The blockedTruthCategories logic should show the banner but it appears empty.

action_items: Investigate why Integrations page shows 'Connected 0' when backend returns connected integrations - may need to add loading state or retry logic
Verify blockedTruthCategories array is being populated from canonicalTruth API response - banner should appear for stale/unverified states
critical_code_review_comments: Backend truth gate working correctly: /api/boardroom/respond, /api/boardroom/diagnosis, /api/war-room/respond all return constrained truth gate messaging
Auth route restoration working: Login -> /advisor redirect works, then navigating to /integrations stays in app shell
API responses show correct truth states: crm_state=stale, accounting_state=stale, email_state=unverified
Frontend Integrations page may have timing issue - connectedCount relies on mergeIntegrations and integrationStatusRows which may not be populated when merge/connected returns 502

success_rate.frontend: 80% - Auth flow works, but Integrations page connected count and truth banner have visibility issues

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend truth gate fully operational. Board Room and War Room correctly show constrained messaging when CRM/accounting/email sources are stale. Auth route restoration working - /integrations accessible after login without bounce. Minor issue: Integrations page shows 'Connected 0' and no forensic source health banner despite backend returning stale/unverified truth states - likely a frontend state population timing issue.

features_verified.boardroom_diagnosis_truth_gate: PASS - Returns forensic truth gate headline when sources stale
features_verified.warroom_truth_gate: PASS - Returns truth gate message with degraded=true when sources stale
features_verified.integration_status_truth_state: PASS - API returns truth_state and truth_reason per integration
features_verified.canonical_truth_states: PASS - API returns crm_state=stale, accounting_state=stale, email_state=unverified
features_verified.integrations_page_truth_banner: PARTIAL - Backend data correct but banner not visible in UI

boardroom_respond.message_preview: Board Room truth gate is active. BIQc is withholding unsupported cross-system claims...

warroom_respond.message_preview: Board Room truth gate is active...
